data.content: Plan: --all is already declared on LeaseListArgs (src/cli_agent.rs:425) and shows in --help. Acceptance #1 and #2 are already met. The only work item is acceptance #3 — add a CLI test in src/cli_lease_tests.rs that uses clap::CommandFactory to render lease list's long help and asserts --all, -a, and 'Include terminated leases' appear. No production code change. Verify with cargo test + make sanity.
